---
title: "schema"
date: 2026-07-12
categories: ["System Guide"]
---

# SumiCare Database Schema Reference

This document describes every table in the SumiCare PostgreSQL database. It is transcribed  
directly from the Liquibase changelogs under  
`apps/sumicare-api/src/main/resources/db/changelog/changes/` (0001–0060) and the JPA  
`@Entity` classes under `apps/sumicare-api/src/main/java/com/sumicare/`.

Conventions used throughout:

* UUID primary keys are generated by PostgreSQL via `gen_random_uuid()`.
* `BIGSERIAL` primary keys use the standard PostgreSQL identity sequence.
* A `TIMESTAMP`/`TIMESTAMPTZ` column with default `CURRENT_TIMESTAMP` / `now()` is set at  
  insert time by the database.
* Every business table carries `organization_id` (FK to `organizations`) for multi-tenant  
  scoping. The seeded tenant is `slug = 'lasema'`.

The following tables were created and later **dropped** and therefore are NOT part of the  
current schema: `decking_state` (created 0001, dropped 0042) and `cashier_shifts`  
(created 0001, dropped 0024). They are noted here for historical completeness but should be  
considered absent.

---

## organizations

**Purpose / module:** Multi-tenant root entity holding tenant identity and public branding. Owning module: `content` / platform core.

|Column|Type|Nullable|Default|Meaning|
|------|----|--------|-------|-------|
|id|UUID|no|gen_random_uuid()|Primary key|
|slug|VARCHAR(64)|no|—|URL-safe tenant identifier|
|display_name|VARCHAR(255)|no|—|Public display name|
|logo_url|VARCHAR(1024)|yes|—|Logo asset URL|
|primary_color|VARCHAR(16)|yes|\#0F766E|Brand primary color|
|secondary_color|VARCHAR(16)|yes|\#14B8A6|Brand secondary color|
|accent_color|VARCHAR(16)|yes|\#F59E0B|Brand accent color|
|theme|VARCHAR(32)|yes|default|Theme key|
|is_active|BOOLEAN|no|true|Tenant active flag|
|created_at|TIMESTAMP|no|CURRENT_TIMESTAMP|Creation timestamp|
|updated_at|TIMESTAMP|no|CURRENT_TIMESTAMP|Last update timestamp|
|font_family|VARCHAR(128)|yes|—|Brand font family (0039)|
|login_background_url|VARCHAR(512)|yes|—|Login page background (0048)|
|favicon_url|VARCHAR(512)|yes|—|Favicon asset URL (0048)|
|instagram_url|VARCHAR(512)|yes|—|Instagram profile URL (0048)|
|contact_phone|VARCHAR(64)|yes|—|Public contact phone (0048)|
|contact_email|VARCHAR(255)|yes|—|Public contact email (0048)|
|footer_note|VARCHAR(512)|yes|—|Public footer note (0048)|

* **Primary key:** `id` (UUID, `gen_random_uuid()`).
* **Foreign keys:** none.
* **Unique constraints:** `slug` — one tenant per slug.
* **Relationships:** parent of nearly every table via `organization_id`.

---

## roles

**Purpose / module:** RBAC role definitions. Owning module: `user` / `auth`.

|Column|Type|Nullable|Default|Meaning|
|------|----|--------|-------|-------|
|id|BIGSERIAL|no|identity|Primary key|
|code|VARCHAR(32)|no|—|Role code (SUPERADMIN, ADMIN, MANAGER, RECEPTIONIST)|
|display_name|VARCHAR(64)|no|—|Human-readable role name|
|hierarchy_level|INT|no|—|Numeric rank used for hierarchy comparisons|

* **Primary key:** `id` (BIGSERIAL).
* **Unique constraints:** `code` — one row per role code.
* **Relationships:** referenced by `users.role_id` and `role_permissions.role_id`.
* **Seed (0002):** SUPERADMIN(100), ADMIN(80), MANAGER(60), RECEPTIONIST(40). The `STAFF(20)` role originally seeded in 0002 was removed by changeset 0059 (its users reassigned to RECEPTIONIST); `STAFF` is not part of the current role set.

---

## permissions

**Purpose / module:** Granular permission catalogue. Owning module: `user` / `auth`.

|Column|Type|Nullable|Default|Meaning|
|------|----|--------|-------|-------|
|id|BIGSERIAL|no|identity|Primary key|
|code|VARCHAR(64)|no|—|Permission code (e.g. MANAGE_USERS)|
|description|VARCHAR(255)|yes|—|Human-readable description|

* **Primary key:** `id` (BIGSERIAL).
* **Unique constraints:** `code`.
* **Relationships:** referenced by `role_permissions` and `user_permission_overrides`.

---

## role_permissions

**Purpose / module:** Join table mapping roles to permissions. Owning module: `user` / `auth`.

|Column|Type|Nullable|Default|Meaning|
|------|----|--------|-------|-------|
|role_id|BIGINT|no|—|FK to `roles.id`|
|permission_id|BIGINT|no|—|FK to `permissions.id`|

* **Primary key:** composite `(role_id, permission_id)`.
* **Foreign keys:** `role_id` → `roles(id)` (`fk_role_permissions_role`); `permission_id` → `permissions(id)` (`fk_role_permissions_perm`). No cascade.
* **Unique constraint:** the composite PK enforces one mapping per role/permission pair.

---

## user_permission_overrides

**Purpose / module:** Per-user grant/deny overrides on top of role permissions. Owning module: `user`.

|Column|Type|Nullable|Default|Meaning|
|------|----|--------|-------|-------|
|user_id|UUID|no|—|FK to `users.id`|
|permission_id|BIGINT|no|—|FK to `permissions.id`|
|granted|BOOLEAN|no|true|Whether the override grants (true) or denies (false)|

* **Primary key:** composite `(user_id, permission_id)`.
* **Foreign keys:** `user_id` → `users(id)` (`fk_upo_user`); `permission_id` → `permissions(id)` (`fk_upo_perm`). No cascade.
* **Unique constraint:** composite PK — one override per user/permission pair.

---

## users

**Purpose / module:** Operator/staff accounts with login credentials. Owning module: `user` / `auth`.

|Column|Type|Nullable|Default|Meaning|
|------|----|--------|-------|-------|
|id|UUID|no|gen_random_uuid()|Primary key|
|organization_id|UUID|no|—|Owning tenant|
|username|VARCHAR(64)|no|—|Login username|
|email|VARCHAR(255)|yes|—|Email address|
|password_hash|VARCHAR(255)|yes (since 0019)|—|BCrypt hash; nullable to allow accounts without a password set|
|role_id|BIGINT|no|—|FK to `roles.id`|
|display_name|VARCHAR(128)|yes|—|Display name|
|is_active|BOOLEAN|no|true|Account active flag|
|created_at|TIMESTAMP|no|CURRENT_TIMESTAMP|Creation timestamp|
|updated_at|TIMESTAMP|no|CURRENT_TIMESTAMP|Last update timestamp|
|email_verified|BOOLEAN|no|false|Email verification flag (0003)|
|failed_login_attempts|INT|no|0|Consecutive failed logins (0027)|
|account_locked|BOOLEAN|no|false|Lockout flag (0027)|

* **Primary key:** `id` (UUID).
* **Foreign keys:** `role_id` → `roles(id)` (`fk_users_role`); `organization_id` → `organizations(id)` (`fk_users_org`). No cascade.
* **Unique constraints:** `username` (global), `email` (global). Each enforces one account per username / per email.
* **Relationships:** referenced by `user_permission_overrides`, `transactions.processed_by`, `orders.cashier_user_id`/`last_edited_by_user_id`, `email_verification_tokens`, `password_reset_tokens`, `feedback.read_by_user_id`, `contact_messages.read_by_user_id`.

---

## email_verification_tokens

**Purpose / module:** Single-use tokens for email verification and (via `token_type`) related flows. Owning module: `auth`.

|Column|Type|Nullable|Default|Meaning|
|------|----|--------|-------|-------|
|id|UUID|no|gen_random_uuid()|Primary key|
|user_id|UUID|no|—|FK to `users.id`, cascade delete|
|token|VARCHAR(128)|no|—|Opaque token value|
|expires_at|TIMESTAMPTZ|no|—|Expiry instant|
|consumed_at|TIMESTAMPTZ|yes|—|When the token was consumed|
|created_at|TIMESTAMPTZ|no|now()|Creation timestamp|
|token_type|VARCHAR(20)|no|VERIFY_EMAIL|Token purpose discriminator (0019)|

* **Primary key:** `id` (UUID).
* **Foreign keys:** `user_id` → `users(id)` **ON DELETE CASCADE** (`fk_evt_user`).
* **Unique constraints:** `token`.
* **Indexes:** `idx_email_tokens_user_type` on `(user_id, token_type)` — fast lookup of a user's active token of a given type.

---

## password_reset_tokens

**Purpose / module:** Single-use password reset tokens. Owning module: `auth`.

|Column|Type|Nullable|Default|Meaning|
|------|----|--------|-------|-------|
|id|UUID|no|gen_random_uuid()|Primary key|
|user_id|UUID|no|—|FK to `users.id`, cascade delete|
|token|VARCHAR(128)|no|—|Opaque token value|
|expires_at|TIMESTAMPTZ|no|—|Expiry instant|
|consumed_at|TIMESTAMPTZ|yes|—|When consumed|
|created_at|TIMESTAMPTZ|no|now()|Creation timestamp|

* **Primary key:** `id` (UUID).
* **Foreign keys:** `user_id` → `users(id)` **ON DELETE CASCADE** (`fk_prt_user`).
* **Unique constraints:** `token`.

---

## services_catalogue

**Purpose / module:** Catalogue of bookable massage/treatment services per tenant. Owning module: `booking` / catalogue.

|Column|Type|Nullable|Default|Meaning|
|------|----|--------|-------|-------|
|id|BIGSERIAL|no|identity|Primary key|
|organization_id|UUID|no|—|Owning tenant|
|code|VARCHAR(64)|no|—|Service code|
|name|VARCHAR(128)|no|—|Service display name|
|duration_minutes|INT|no|—|Default duration|
|commission_amount|NUMERIC(12,2)|no|—|Base therapist commission|
|price|NUMERIC(12,2)|no|—|Client price|
|category|VARCHAR(32)|yes|—|Category grouping (e.g. MASSAGE)|
|requires_two_therapists|BOOLEAN|no|false|True for Tandem-type services|
|is_fixed_rate|BOOLEAN|no|false|Fixed-rate flag|
|is_vip|BOOLEAN|no|false|VIP service flag|
|is_active|BOOLEAN|no|true|Active flag|
|description|TEXT|yes|—|Long description (0003)|
|image_url|VARCHAR(512)|yes|—|Image asset URL (0003)|

* **Primary key:** `id` (BIGSERIAL).
* **Foreign keys:** `organization_id` → `organizations(id)` (`fk_services_org`).
* **Unique constraints:** `uq_services_org_code` on `(organization_id, code)` — one service code per tenant.
* **Relationships:** referenced by `bookings.service_id`, `package_tiers.service_id`, `order_item_attendees.service_id`, `recommendation_weights.service_id`.

---

## therapists

**Purpose / module:** Therapist profiles. Owning module: `therapist`.

|Column|Type|Nullable|Default|Meaning|
|------|----|--------|-------|-------|
|id|UUID|no|gen_random_uuid()|Primary key|
|organization_id|UUID|no|—|Owning tenant|
|staff_number|VARCHAR(32)|yes|—|Staff identifier|
|nickname|VARCHAR(64)|no|—|Therapist nickname (used on slips)|
|gender|VARCHAR(8)|no|—|Gender (drives client gender rules)|
|is_backup|BOOLEAN|no|false|Backup therapist flag (never in automatic lineup)|
|is_active|BOOLEAN|no|true|Active flag|
|created_at|TIMESTAMP|no|CURRENT_TIMESTAMP|Creation timestamp|

* **Primary key:** `id` (UUID).
* **Foreign keys:** `organization_id` → `organizations(id)` (`fk_therapists_org`).
* **Unique constraints:** `uq_therapists_org_staff` on `(organization_id, staff_number)` — one staff number per tenant.
* **Relationships:** referenced by `shift_assignments`, `therapist_attendance`, `sessions.primary_therapist_id`/`secondary_therapist_id`, `commissions.therapist_id`.

---

## shifts

**Purpose / module:** Shift definitions (label and time window). Owning module: `shift`.

|Column|Type|Nullable|Default|Meaning|
|------|----|--------|-------|-------|
|id|BIGSERIAL|no|identity|Primary key|
|organization_id|UUID|no|—|Owning tenant|
|label|VARCHAR(64)|no|—|Shift label|
|start_time|TIME|no|—|Shift start time|
|end_time|TIME|no|—|Shift end time|
|expected_count|INT|yes|0|Expected therapist count|
|is_active|BOOLEAN|no|true|Active flag|

* **Primary key:** `id` (BIGSERIAL).
* **Foreign keys:** `organization_id` → `organizations(id)` (`fk_shifts_org`).
* **Relationships:** referenced by `shift_assignments.shift_id` and `cutoff_reports.shift_id`.

---

## shift_assignments

**Purpose / module:** Assignment of a therapist to a shift on a date. Owning module: `shift`.

|Column|Type|Nullable|Default|Meaning|
|------|----|--------|-------|-------|
|id|BIGSERIAL|no|identity|Primary key|
|shift_id|BIGINT|no|—|FK to `shifts.id`|
|therapist_id|UUID|no|—|FK to `therapists.id`|
|effective_date|DATE|no|—|Date the assignment applies|

* **Primary key:** `id` (BIGSERIAL).
* **Foreign keys:** `shift_id` → `shifts(id)` (`fk_sa_shift`); `therapist_id` → `therapists(id)` (`fk_sa_therapist`).
* **Unique constraints:** `uq_shift_assignment` on `(shift_id, therapist_id, effective_date)` — one assignment per therapist per shift per day.

---

## therapist_attendance

**Purpose / module:** Attendance event log per therapist. Owning module: `attendance`.

|Column|Type|Nullable|Default|Meaning|
|------|----|--------|-------|-------|
|id|BIGSERIAL|no|identity|Primary key|
|therapist_id|UUID|no|—|FK to `therapists.id`|
|event_type|VARCHAR(16)|no|—|Event type (clock-in/out, D.O., absence)|
|event_at|TIMESTAMP|no|—|When the event occurred|
|device_id|VARCHAR(64)|yes|—|Originating device identifier|
|remarks|VARCHAR(512)|yes|—|Free-text remarks|

* **Primary key:** `id` (BIGSERIAL).
* **Foreign keys:** `therapist_id` → `therapists(id)` (`fk_attendance_therapist`).
* **Indexes:** `ix_attendance_therapist_at` on `(therapist_id, event_at)` — time-ordered attendance lookups for report generation.

---

## rooms

**Purpose / module:** Treatment rooms. Owning module: `room`.

|Column|Type|Nullable|Default|Meaning|
|------|----|--------|-------|-------|
|id|UUID|no|gen_random_uuid()|Primary key|
|organization_id|UUID|no|—|Owning tenant|
|room_number|VARCHAR(16)|no|—|Room label/number|
|floor|INT|yes|1|Floor number|
|room_type|VARCHAR(16)|no|—|COMMON / PRIVATE / VIP|
|row_segmented|BOOLEAN|no|false|Whether gender segregation applies per row|
|is_active|BOOLEAN|no|true|Active flag|
|vip_tier|VARCHAR(20)|yes|—|VIP tier label (e.g. DIAMOND) (0012)|

* **Primary key:** `id` (UUID).
* **Foreign keys:** `organization_id` → `organizations(id)` (`fk_rooms_org`).
* **Unique constraints:** `uq_rooms_org_number` on `(organization_id, room_number)`.
* **Relationships:** parent of `beds`; referenced by `sessions.room_id`.

---

## beds

**Purpose / module:** Individual beds within a room. Owning module: `room`.

|Column|Type|Nullable|Default|Meaning|
|------|----|--------|-------|-------|
|id|UUID|no|gen_random_uuid()|Primary key|
|room_id|UUID|no|—|FK to `rooms.id`|
|bed_label|VARCHAR(16)|no|—|Bed label|
|row_index|INT|yes|—|Row index for segmentation logic|
|is_active|BOOLEAN|no|true|Active flag|

* **Primary key:** `id` (UUID).
* **Foreign keys:** `room_id` → `rooms(id)` (`fk_beds_room`).
* **Unique constraints:** `uq_beds_room_label` on `(room_id, bed_label)`.
* **Relationships:** referenced by `sessions.bed_id`. Live occupancy state is held in Redis, not in this table (see `docs/database/redis.md`).

---

## clients

**Purpose / module:** Optional, non-critical client accounts (usage tracking, voucher eligibility, recommendations). Owning module: `client`.

|Column|Type|Nullable|Default|Meaning|
|------|----|--------|-------|-------|
|id|UUID|no|gen_random_uuid()|Primary key|
|organization_id|UUID|no|—|Owning tenant|
|nickname|VARCHAR(64)|no|—|Client nickname (never a real name)|
|email|VARCHAR(255)|yes|—|Email address|
|facebook_handle|VARCHAR(128)|yes|—|Facebook handle|
|gender|VARCHAR(8)|yes|—|Gender|
|nationality|VARCHAR(64)|yes|—|Nationality|
|consent_given|BOOLEAN|yes|false|General consent flag|
|data_tracking_consent|BOOLEAN|yes|false|Tracking consent flag|
|created_at|TIMESTAMP|no|CURRENT_TIMESTAMP|Creation timestamp|
|deleted_at|TIMESTAMPTZ|yes|—|Soft-delete marker (0045)|

* **Primary key:** `id` (UUID).
* **Foreign keys:** `organization_id` → `organizations(id)` (`fk_clients_org`).
* **Unique constraints:** `uq_clients_org_email` on `(organization_id, email)` — one client per email per tenant. The original nickname uniqueness (`uq_clients_org_nick`) was **dropped in 0046**, so nicknames may now repeat.
* **Relationships:** referenced by `bookings.client_id`, `feedback.client_id`, `recommendations_log.client_id`, `voucher_redemptions.client_id`.

---

## bookings

**Purpose / module:** Appointment/reservation records (walk-in or online). Owning module: `booking`.

|Column|Type|Nullable|Default|Meaning|
|------|----|--------|-------|-------|
|id|UUID|no|gen_random_uuid()|Primary key|
|organization_id|UUID|no|—|Owning tenant|
|client_id|UUID|yes|—|Optional FK to `clients.id`|
|client_nickname|VARCHAR(64)|no|—|Nickname captured on the booking|
|locker_number|VARCHAR(16)|yes|—|Assigned locker|
|service_id|BIGINT|no|—|FK to `services_catalogue.id`|
|reservation_type|VARCHAR(16)|no|—|HARD / SOFT reservation|
|scheduled_at|TIMESTAMP|no|—|Scheduled start time|
|actual_start_at|TIMESTAMP|yes|—|Actual start (receptionist-adjustable)|
|actual_end_at|TIMESTAMP|yes|—|Actual end|
|status|VARCHAR(32)|no|PENDING|Booking lifecycle status|
|created_at|TIMESTAMP|no|CURRENT_TIMESTAMP|Creation timestamp|
|payment_status|VARCHAR(20)|no|UNPAID|UNPAID / PARTIAL / PAID / REFUNDED (0003)|
|gateway_payment_id|VARCHAR(255)|yes|—|Payment gateway reference (0003)|
|client_gender|VARCHAR(1)|yes|—|Client gender code (0005; widened in 0006)|
|pax|INT|yes|—|Party size (0004)|
|client_email|VARCHAR(255)|yes|—|Contact email (0021)|
|nationality|VARCHAR(80)|yes|—|Client nationality (0022)|
|remarks|TEXT|yes|—|Free-text remarks (0047)|
|reference|VARCHAR(8)|yes|—|Short human-friendly booking reference (0049)|
|preferred_therapist|VARCHAR(120)|yes|—|Optional free-text preferred-therapist remark; shown in booking detail and never allocates a therapist (0060)|

* **Primary key:** `id` (UUID).
* **Foreign keys:** `organization_id` → `organizations(id)` (`fk_bookings_org`); `client_id` → `clients(id)` (`fk_bookings_client`); `service_id` → `services_catalogue(id)` (`fk_bookings_service`).
* **Indexes:** `ix_bookings_org_scheduled` on `(organization_id, scheduled_at)` — schedule lookups; `idx_bookings_org_status` on `(organization_id, status)` (0051) — status filtering.
* **Relationships:** referenced by `sessions.booking_id`, `treatment_slips.booking_id`, `orders.booking_id`.

---

## sessions

**Purpose / module:** A treatment session derived from a booking (therapist, room, bed, timing). Owning module: `booking` / `transaction`.

|Column|Type|Nullable|Default|Meaning|
|------|----|--------|-------|-------|
|id|UUID|no|gen_random_uuid()|Primary key|
|booking_id|UUID|no|—|FK to `bookings.id`|
|organization_id|UUID|no|—|Owning tenant|
|primary_therapist_id|UUID|yes|—|FK to `therapists.id`|
|secondary_therapist_id|UUID|yes|—|FK to `therapists.id` (tandem)|
|room_id|UUID|yes|—|FK to `rooms.id`|
|bed_id|UUID|yes|—|FK to `beds.id`|
|is_specifically_requested|BOOLEAN|no|false|Requested-therapist flag|
|is_extension|BOOLEAN|no|false|Extension session flag|
|extension_minutes|INT|yes|0|Extra minutes|
|status|VARCHAR(32)|no|ACTIVE|Session status|
|started_at|TIMESTAMP|yes|—|Start time|
|ended_at|TIMESTAMP|yes|—|End time|
|created_at|TIMESTAMP|no|CURRENT_TIMESTAMP|Creation timestamp|
|expected_end_at|TIMESTAMPTZ|yes|—|Computed expected end (0003)|
|attendee_id|UUID|yes|—|Links to `order_item_attendees.id` (0012)|

* **Primary key:** `id` (UUID).
* **Foreign keys:** `booking_id` → `bookings(id)` (`fk_sessions_booking`); `organization_id` → `organizations(id)` (`fk_sessions_org`); `primary_therapist_id` → `therapists(id)` (`fk_sessions_primary`); `secondary_therapist_id` → `therapists(id)` (`fk_sessions_secondary`); `room_id` → `rooms(id)` (`fk_sessions_room`); `bed_id` → `beds(id)` (`fk_sessions_bed`).
* **Indexes:** `idx_sessions_attendee` on `attendee_id` (0012); `idx_sessions_booking` on `booking_id` (0051); `idx_sessions_org_status` on `(organization_id, status)` (0057); `uq_active_session_locker_gender` — **partial unique** index on `(organization_id, attendee_id)` `WHERE status = 'ACTIVE' AND attendee_id IS NOT NULL` (0040), enforcing at most one active session per attendee.
* **Relationships:** referenced by `treatment_slips.session_id`, `transactions.session_id`, `commissions.session_id`, `feedback.session_id`, `order_item_attendees.session_id`.

---

## orders

**Purpose / module:** POS order aggregating charges for a booking/group. Owning module: `pos`.

|Column|Type|Nullable|Default|Meaning|
|------|----|--------|-------|-------|
|id|UUID|no|gen_random_uuid()|Primary key|
|organization_id|UUID|no|—|Owning tenant|
|booking_id|UUID|yes (since 0012)|—|FK to `bookings.id`|
|treatment_slip_id|UUID|yes|—|FK to `treatment_slips.id`|
|cashier_user_id|UUID|yes|—|Cashier who handled the order|
|or_number|VARCHAR(50)|yes|—|Official receipt number|
|reference_number|VARCHAR(100)|yes|—|External reference|
|notes|TEXT|yes|—|Notes|
|subtotal|NUMERIC(12,2)|no|0|Subtotal|
|discount|NUMERIC(12,2)|no|0|Discount amount|
|total|NUMERIC(12,2)|no|0|Order total|
|amount_paid|NUMERIC(12,2)|no|0|Amount paid|
|status|VARCHAR(20)|no|PENDING|Order status (OPEN/PAID/CANCELLED/REFUNDED, etc.)|
|created_at|TIMESTAMP|no|CURRENT_TIMESTAMP|Creation timestamp|
|completed_at|TIMESTAMP|yes|—|Completion time|
|finished_at|TIMESTAMP|yes|—|Finished time|
|cancelled_at|TIMESTAMP|yes|—|Cancellation time|
|cancelled_reason|TEXT|yes|—|Cancellation reason|
|voucher_id|UUID|yes|—|Applied voucher (0016)|
|transactor_name|VARCHAR(120)|yes|—|Walk-in transactor name (0012)|
|is_group_booking|BOOLEAN|no|false|Group booking flag (0012)|
|room_type|VARCHAR(20)|no|COMMON|Room type charged (0012)|
|room_type_charge|NUMERIC(12,2)|no|0|Room type surcharge (0012)|
|is_weekend|BOOLEAN|no|false|Weekend pricing flag (0012)|
|tax|NUMERIC(12,2)|no|0|Tax amount (0020)|
|last_edited_by_user_id|UUID|yes|—|Last editor (0024)|
|extension_amount|NUMERIC(12,2)|no|0|Extension charge (0028)|
|extension_minutes|INT|no|0|Extension minutes (0028)|
|completion_email_sent_at|TIMESTAMPTZ|yes|—|Completion email timestamp (0033)|
|payment_email_sent_at|TIMESTAMPTZ|yes|—|Payment email timestamp (0050)|
|preferred_therapist|VARCHAR(120)|yes|—|Optional free-text preferred-therapist remark; shown in order detail and never allocates a therapist (0060)|

* **Primary key:** `id` (UUID).
* **Foreign keys:** `organization_id` → `organizations(id)` (`fk_orders_organization`); `booking_id` → `bookings(id)` (`fk_orders_booking`); `treatment_slip_id` → `treatment_slips(id)` (`fk_orders_treatment_slip`).
* **Unique constraints:** `booking_id` was originally UNIQUE; the constraint was **dropped in 0012** so multiple orders (group bookings) may share a booking.
* **Indexes:** `idx_orders_org_status_created` on `(organization_id, status, created_at)`; `idx_orders_booking_id` on `booking_id` (0012).
* **Relationships:** parent of `order_items`, `order_item_attendees`; referenced by `transactions.order_id`, `voucher_redemptions.order_id`.

---

## order_items

**Purpose / module:** Line items on an order (packages purchased). Owning module: `pos`.

|Column|Type|Nullable|Default|Meaning|
|------|----|--------|-------|-------|
|id|UUID|no|gen_random_uuid()|Primary key|
|order_id|UUID|no|—|FK to `orders.id`, cascade delete|
|organization_id|UUID|no|—|Owning tenant|
|package_id|BIGINT|no|—|FK to `packages.id`|
|quantity|INT|no|1|Quantity|
|unit_price|NUMERIC(12,2)|no|—|Unit price|
|line_total|NUMERIC(12,2)|no|—|Line total|
|position|INT|no|0|Display order|
|created_at|TIMESTAMPTZ|no|now()|Creation timestamp|
|room_type|VARCHAR(20)|no|COMMON|Room type for this item (0031)|
|room_type_charge|NUMERIC(12,2)|no|0|Room type surcharge (0031)|

* **Primary key:** `id` (UUID).
* **Foreign keys:** `order_id` → `orders(id)` **ON DELETE CASCADE** (`fk_order_items_order`); `package_id` → `packages(id)` (`fk_order_items_package`).
* **Indexes:** `idx_order_items_order` on `order_id`.
* **Relationships:** parent of `order_item_attendees`.

---

## order_item_attendees

**Purpose / module:** Per-attendee detail within an order line (one row per person served). Owning module: `pos`.

|Column|Type|Nullable|Default|Meaning|
|------|----|--------|-------|-------|
|id|UUID|no|gen_random_uuid()|Primary key|
|order_item_id|UUID|no|—|FK to `order_items.id`, cascade delete|
|order_id|UUID|no|—|FK to `orders.id`|
|organization_id|UUID|no|—|Owning tenant|
|service_id|BIGINT|yes|—|FK to `services_catalogue.id`|
|package_tier_id|BIGINT|yes|—|FK to `package_tiers.id`|
|locker_number|VARCHAR(16)|yes|—|Locker number|
|client_gender|VARCHAR(1)|yes|—|Attendee gender code|
|session_id|UUID|yes|—|Linked session|
|treatment_slip_id|UUID|yes|—|Linked treatment slip|
|position|INT|no|0|Display order|
|created_at|TIMESTAMPTZ|no|now()|Creation timestamp|
|discount|NUMERIC(12,2)|no|0|Per-attendee discount (0022)|
|provided_tsn|VARCHAR(64)|yes|—|Externally provided TSN (0022)|

* **Primary key:** `id` (UUID).
* **Foreign keys:** `order_item_id` → `order_items(id)` **ON DELETE CASCADE** (`fk_oia_item`); `order_id` → `orders(id)` (`fk_oia_order`); `service_id` → `services_catalogue(id)` (`fk_oia_service`); `package_tier_id` → `package_tiers(id)` (`fk_oia_tier`).
* **Indexes:** `idx_oia_item` on `order_item_id`; `idx_oia_session` on `session_id`; `idx_oia_slip` on `treatment_slip_id`; `idx_oia_order` on `order_id` (0051).
* **Relationships:** referenced by `sessions.attendee_id` and `treatment_slips.attendee_id`.

---

## packages

**Purpose / module:** Sellable packages (e.g. couple, VIP). Owning module: `pos` / catalogue.

|Column|Type|Nullable|Default|Meaning|
|------|----|--------|-------|-------|
|id|BIGSERIAL|no|identity|Primary key|
|organization_id|UUID|no|—|Owning tenant|
|code|VARCHAR(40)|no|—|Package code|
|name|VARCHAR(120)|no|—|Package name|
|description|TEXT|yes|—|Description|
|benefits|TEXT|yes|—|Benefits text|
|max_stay_hours|INT|yes|—|Max facility stay|
|default_pax|INT|no|1|Default party size|
|is_couple|BOOLEAN|no|false|Couple package flag|
|includes_massage|BOOLEAN|no|true|Includes massage flag|
|bundles_private_room|BOOLEAN|no|false|Bundles a private room|
|is_active|BOOLEAN|no|true|Active flag|
|created_at|TIMESTAMPTZ|no|now()|Creation timestamp|
|requires_vip_room|BOOLEAN|no|false|Requires a VIP room (0014)|

* **Primary key:** `id` (BIGSERIAL).
* **Foreign keys:** `organization_id` → `organizations(id)` (`fk_packages_org`).
* **Unique constraints:** `uq_packages_org_code` on `(organization_id, code)`.
* **Relationships:** parent of `package_tiers`; referenced by `order_items.package_id`, `vouchers.target_package_id`.

---

## package_tiers

**Purpose / module:** Per-service price tiers of a package (weekday/weekend). Owning module: `pos` / catalogue.

|Column|Type|Nullable|Default|Meaning|
|------|----|--------|-------|-------|
|id|BIGSERIAL|no|identity|Primary key|
|package_id|BIGINT|no|—|FK to `packages.id`, cascade delete|
|service_id|BIGINT|yes|—|FK to `services_catalogue.id`|
|weekday_price|NUMERIC(12,2)|no|—|Weekday price|
|weekend_price|NUMERIC(12,2)|no|—|Weekend price|

* **Primary key:** `id` (BIGSERIAL).
* **Foreign keys:** `package_id` → `packages(id)` **ON DELETE CASCADE** (`fk_package_tiers_package`); `service_id` → `services_catalogue(id)` (`fk_package_tiers_service`).
* **Indexes:** `idx_package_tiers_package` on `package_id`.
* **Relationships:** referenced by `order_item_attendees.package_tier_id`.

---

## discount_templates

**Purpose / module:** Reusable discount definitions. Owning module: `pos`.

|Column|Type|Nullable|Default|Meaning|
|------|----|--------|-------|-------|
|id|UUID|no|gen_random_uuid()|Primary key|
|organization_id|UUID|no|—|Owning tenant|
|name|VARCHAR(120)|no|—|Template name|
|amount_type|VARCHAR(16)|no|PERCENT|PERCENT or fixed|
|percent|NUMERIC(6,2)|yes|—|Percentage value|
|fixed_amount|NUMERIC(12,2)|yes|—|Fixed amount|
|created_at|TIMESTAMPTZ|no|now()|Creation timestamp|

* **Primary key:** `id` (UUID).
* **Foreign keys:** none declared.
* **Indexes:** `idx_discount_templates_org` on `organization_id`.

---

## ledger_accounts

**Purpose / module:** Chart-of-accounts entries for the POS ledger. Owning module: `pos`.

|Column|Type|Nullable|Default|Meaning|
|------|----|--------|-------|-------|
|id|UUID|no|—|Primary key (no DB default; assigned by application)|
|organization_id|UUID|no|—|Owning tenant|
|name|VARCHAR(120)|no|—|Account name|
|short_name|VARCHAR(40)|no|—|Short code|
|type|VARCHAR(20)|no|—|Account type|
|created_at|TIMESTAMPTZ|no|now()|Creation timestamp|

* **Primary key:** `id` (UUID; not DB-generated — note the column has no `defaultValueComputed`).
* **Foreign keys:** none declared.

---

## treatment_slips

**Purpose / module:** Digitized treatment slips. Owning module: `transaction`.

|Column|Type|Nullable|Default|Meaning|
|------|----|--------|-------|-------|
|id|UUID|no|gen_random_uuid()|Primary key|
|organization_id|UUID|no|—|Owning tenant|
|tsn|VARCHAR(32)|no|—|Treatment slip number|
|booking_id|UUID|no|—|FK to `bookings.id`|
|session_id|UUID|yes|—|FK to `sessions.id`|
|client_nickname|VARCHAR(64)|no|—|Client nickname|
|locker_number|VARCHAR(16)|yes|—|Locker number|
|requested_therapist_nickname|VARCHAR(64)|yes|—|Requested therapist nickname|
|primary_therapist_nickname|VARCHAR(64)|yes|—|Primary therapist nickname|
|secondary_therapist_nickname|VARCHAR(64)|yes|—|Secondary therapist nickname|
|service_name|VARCHAR(128)|no|—|Service name|
|room_number|VARCHAR(16)|yes|—|Room number|
|start_time|TIMESTAMP|yes|—|Start time|
|end_time|TIMESTAMP|yes|—|End time|
|is_vip|BOOLEAN|yes|false|VIP flag|
|signed_at|TIMESTAMP|yes|—|When client signed|
|created_at|TIMESTAMP|no|CURRENT_TIMESTAMP|Creation timestamp|
|pax|INT|yes|—|Party size (0004)|
|treatment_minutes|INT|yes|—|Treatment minutes (0004)|
|jacuzzi_minutes|INT|yes|—|Jacuzzi minutes (0004)|
|massage_minutes|INT|yes|—|Massage minutes (0004)|
|wine_included|BOOLEAN|yes|—|Wine included flag (0004)|
|or_number|VARCHAR(64)|yes|—|Official receipt number (0004)|
|add_on_or_number|VARCHAR(64)|yes|—|Add-on OR number (0004)|
|others_add_on|TEXT|yes|—|Other add-ons (0004)|
|remarks|TEXT|yes|—|Remarks (0004)|
|total_amount|NUMERIC(12,2)|yes|—|Total amount (0004)|
|waiver_accepted|BOOLEAN|no|false|Waiver accepted flag (0004)|
|waiver_accepted_at|TIMESTAMPTZ|yes|—|Waiver acceptance time (0004)|
|status|VARCHAR(20)|no|DRAFT|Slip status (0007)|
|nationality|VARCHAR(64)|yes|—|Client nationality (0018)|
|package_name|VARCHAR(120)|yes|—|Package name (0020)|
|attendee_id|UUID|yes|—|Linked attendee (0012)|
|extension_minutes|INT|yes|—|Extension minutes (0035)|
|client_gender|VARCHAR(1)|yes|—|Client gender code (0035)|

* **Primary key:** `id` (UUID).
* **Foreign keys:** `booking_id` → `bookings(id)` (`fk_ts_booking`); `session_id` → `sessions(id)` (`fk_ts_session`); `organization_id` → `organizations(id)` (`fk_ts_org`).
* **Unique constraints:** `uq_ts_org_tsn` on `(organization_id, tsn)` — one TSN per tenant.
* **Indexes:** `idx_slips_attendee` on `attendee_id` (0012).

---

## transactions

**Purpose / module:** POS payment transactions. Owning module: `pos`.

|Column|Type|Nullable|Default|Meaning|
|------|----|--------|-------|-------|
|id|UUID|no|gen_random_uuid()|Primary key|
|organization_id|UUID|no|—|Owning tenant|
|session_id|UUID|yes (since 0009)|—|FK to `sessions.id`|
|receipt_number|VARCHAR(32)|no|—|Receipt number|
|subtotal|NUMERIC(12,2)|no|—|Subtotal|
|discount|NUMERIC(12,2)|yes|0|Discount|
|total|NUMERIC(12,2)|no|—|Total|
|payment_method|VARCHAR(16)|no|—|cash/gcash/credit/debit|
|processed_by|UUID|yes (since 0009)|—|FK to `users.id`|
|processed_at|TIMESTAMP|no|CURRENT_TIMESTAMP|Processing time|
|status|VARCHAR(16)|no|COMPLETED|Transaction status|
|order_id|UUID|yes|—|Linked order (0009)|
|tax|NUMERIC(12,2)|no|0|Tax amount (0020)|
|reference_number|VARCHAR(100)|yes|—|External reference (0026)|

* **Primary key:** `id` (UUID).
* **Foreign keys:** `session_id` → `sessions(id)` (`fk_tx_session`); `processed_by` → `users(id)` (`fk_tx_user`); `organization_id` → `organizations(id)` (`fk_tx_org`). `session_id` and `processed_by` were made nullable in 0009.
* **Unique constraints:** `uq_tx_org_receipt` on `(organization_id, receipt_number)`.
* **Relationships:** parent of `transaction_ledger`.

---

## transaction_ledger

**Purpose / module:** Immutable, append-only ledger of money movements. Owning module: `pos`.

|Column|Type|Nullable|Default|Meaning|
|------|----|--------|-------|-------|
|id|BIGSERIAL|no|identity|Primary key|
|organization_id|UUID|no|—|Owning tenant|
|transaction_id|UUID|no|—|FK to `transactions.id`|
|entry_type|VARCHAR(40)|no|—|Entry type (widened to 40 in 0015)|
|amount|NUMERIC(12,2)|no|—|Entry amount|
|recorded_at|TIMESTAMP|no|CURRENT_TIMESTAMP|Record time|
|metadata|TEXT|yes|—|JSON/text metadata|
|payment_method|VARCHAR(20)|yes|—|Payment method (0007)|
|status|VARCHAR(20)|no|COMPLETED|COMPLETED / REFUND (0011)|
|gateway_reference|VARCHAR(128)|yes|—|Gateway reference (0041)|

* **Primary key:** `id` (BIGSERIAL).
* **Foreign keys:** `transaction_id` → `transactions(id)` (`fk_ledger_tx`).
* **Indexes:** `idx_ledger_org_method_recorded` on `(organization_id, payment_method, recorded_at)` (0007); `ix_ledger_gateway_reference` on `gateway_reference` (0041).
* **Immutability:** rows are insert-only by design; no update/delete paths.

---

## commissions

**Purpose / module:** Therapist commission records per session. Owning module: `transaction` / `therapist`.

|Column|Type|Nullable|Default|Meaning|
|------|----|--------|-------|-------|
|id|BIGSERIAL|no|identity|Primary key|
|organization_id|UUID|no|—|Owning tenant|
|session_id|UUID|no|—|FK to `sessions.id`|
|therapist_id|UUID|no|—|FK to `therapists.id`|
|amount|NUMERIC(12,2)|no|—|Commission amount|
|is_extension|BOOLEAN|yes|false|Extension commission flag|
|is_backup|BOOLEAN|yes|false|Backup therapist flag|
|created_at|TIMESTAMP|no|CURRENT_TIMESTAMP|Creation timestamp|
|service_id|BIGINT|yes|—|Service reference (0010)|
|service_type|VARCHAR(50)|yes|—|Service type label (0010)|
|specifically_requested|BOOLEAN|yes|false|Requested-therapist flag (0010)|

* **Primary key:** `id` (BIGSERIAL).
* **Foreign keys:** `session_id` → `sessions(id)` (`fk_comm_session`); `therapist_id` → `therapists(id)` (`fk_comm_therapist`).

---

## vouchers

**Purpose / module:** Discount vouchers. Owning module: `pos` / `client`.

|Column|Type|Nullable|Default|Meaning|
|------|----|--------|-------|-------|
|id|UUID|no|gen_random_uuid()|Primary key|
|organization_id|UUID|no|—|Owning tenant|
|code|VARCHAR(64)|no|—|Voucher code|
|discount_amount|NUMERIC(12,2)|yes|—|Fixed discount|
|discount_percent|INT|yes|—|Percentage discount|
|valid_from|DATE|yes|—|Validity start|
|valid_until|DATE|yes|—|Validity end|
|is_active|BOOLEAN|yes|true|Active flag|
|name|VARCHAR(255)|yes|—|Display name (0017)|
|target_package_id|BIGINT|yes|—|Restricts voucher to a package (0038)|
|usage_limit|INT|yes|—|Max redemptions (0055)|

* **Primary key:** `id` (UUID).
* **Unique constraints:** `uq_voucher_code` on `(organization_id, code)`.
* **Note:** the original single-use columns `redeemed_at` and `redeemed_by_client_id` were **dropped in 0055**; redemptions are now tracked in `voucher_redemptions`.
* **Relationships:** referenced by `orders.voucher_id`, `voucher_redemptions.voucher_id`.

---

## voucher_redemptions

**Purpose / module:** Records of voucher redemptions, enforcing per-client single use. Owning module: `pos` / `client`.

|Column|Type|Nullable|Default|Meaning|
|------|----|--------|-------|-------|
|id|UUID|no|gen_random_uuid()|Primary key|
|organization_id|UUID|no|—|Owning tenant|
|voucher_id|UUID|no|—|Redeemed voucher|
|client_id|UUID|no|—|Redeeming client|
|order_id|UUID|yes|—|Associated order|
|redeemed_at|TIMESTAMPTZ|no|now()|Redemption time|

* **Primary key:** `id` (UUID).
* **Foreign keys:** none declared at DB level (referential links by id only).
* **Unique constraints:** `uq_voucher_redemption_client` — unique index on `(voucher_id, client_id)` enforcing one redemption of a voucher per client.
* **Indexes:** `idx_voucher_redemption_voucher` on `voucher_id`.
* Introduced in 0055.

---

## feedback

**Purpose / module:** Client feedback/ratings. Owning module: `public` / `content`.

|Column|Type|Nullable|Default|Meaning|
|------|----|--------|-------|-------|
|id|UUID|no|gen_random_uuid()|Primary key|
|organization_id|UUID|no|—|Owning tenant|
|session_id|UUID|yes|—|Related session|
|client_id|UUID|yes|—|Related client|
|rating_stars|INT|no|—|Star rating|
|comment|TEXT|yes|—|Free-text comment|
|submitted_at|TIMESTAMP|no|CURRENT_TIMESTAMP|Submission time|
|nickname|VARCHAR(120)|yes|—|Submitter nickname (0023)|
|or_number|VARCHAR(50)|yes|—|OR number reference (0036)|
|read_at|TIMESTAMPTZ|yes|—|When marked read (0044)|
|read_by_user_id|UUID|yes|—|Operator who read it (0044)|

* **Primary key:** `id` (UUID).
* **Foreign keys:** none declared at DB level.
* **Indexes:** `idx_feedback_org_unread` on `(organization_id, read_at)` (0044) — unread-feedback queries.

---

## contact_messages

**Purpose / module:** Public contact-form submissions. Owning module: `public` / `content`.

|Column|Type|Nullable|Default|Meaning|
|------|----|--------|-------|-------|
|id|UUID|no|gen_random_uuid()|Primary key|
|organization_id|UUID|no|—|Owning tenant|
|name|VARCHAR(255)|no|—|Sender name|
|email|VARCHAR(255)|no|—|Sender email|
|message|TEXT|no|—|Message body|
|ip_address|VARCHAR(45)|yes|—|Source IP|
|created_at|TIMESTAMP|no|CURRENT_TIMESTAMP|Creation timestamp|
|read_at|TIMESTAMP|yes|—|When marked read|
|read_by_user_id|UUID|yes|—|Operator who read it|

* **Primary key:** `id` (UUID).
* **Foreign keys:** `organization_id` → `organizations(id)` (`fk_contact_messages_org`).
* **Indexes:** `idx_contact_messages_org_read` on `(organization_id, read_at, created_at)`.
* Introduced in 0008.

---

## website_content_blocks

**Purpose / module:** Editable public website content (CMS). Owning module: `content`.

|Column|Type|Nullable|Default|Meaning|
|------|----|--------|-------|-------|
|id|UUID|no|gen_random_uuid()|Primary key|
|organization_id|UUID|no|—|Owning tenant|
|section_key|VARCHAR(64)|no|—|Section identifier|
|title|VARCHAR(255)|yes|—|Block title|
|body|TEXT|yes|—|Block body|
|image_url|VARCHAR(1024)|yes|—|Image asset URL|
|display_order|INT|yes|0|Ordering|
|is_published|BOOLEAN|yes|true|Published flag|
|updated_at|TIMESTAMP|yes|CURRENT_TIMESTAMP|Last update timestamp|

* **Primary key:** `id` (UUID).
* **Unique constraints:** `uq_content_section` on `(organization_id, section_key)` — one block per section per tenant.

---

## recommendation_questions

**Purpose / module:** Quiz question definitions for the weighted-scoring recommendation engine. Owning module: `recommendation`.

|Column|Type|Nullable|Default|Meaning|
|------|----|--------|-------|-------|
|id|BIGSERIAL|no|identity|Primary key|
|code|VARCHAR(64)|no|—|Question code|
|prompt|VARCHAR(255)|no|—|Question text|
|display_order|INT|yes|0|Display order|

* **Primary key:** `id` (BIGSERIAL).
* **Unique constraints:** `code`.
* **Relationships:** parent of `recommendation_options`.

---

## recommendation_options

**Purpose / module:** Answer options for each quiz question. Owning module: `recommendation`.

|Column|Type|Nullable|Default|Meaning|
|------|----|--------|-------|-------|
|id|BIGSERIAL|no|identity|Primary key|
|question_id|BIGINT|no|—|FK to `recommendation_questions.id`|
|code|VARCHAR(64)|no|—|Option code|
|label|VARCHAR(255)|no|—|Option label|
|display_order|INT|yes|0|Display order|

* **Primary key:** `id` (BIGSERIAL).
* **Foreign keys:** `question_id` → `recommendation_questions(id)` (`fk_ro_question`).
* **Unique constraints:** `uq_ro_qcode` on `(question_id, code)` — one option code per question.

---

## recommendation_weights

**Purpose / module:** Configurable weight matrix mapping each (question, option) pair to a service score delta. Owning module: `recommendation`.

|Column|Type|Nullable|Default|Meaning|
|------|----|--------|-------|-------|
|id|BIGSERIAL|no|identity|Primary key|
|organization_id|UUID|no|—|Owning tenant|
|question_code|VARCHAR(64)|no|—|Question code|
|option_code|VARCHAR(64)|no|—|Option code|
|service_id|BIGINT|no|—|FK to `services_catalogue.id`|
|weight|INT|no|—|Score weight contributed to the service|

* **Primary key:** `id` (BIGSERIAL).
* **Foreign keys:** `service_id` → `services_catalogue(id)` (`fk_rw_service`).
* **Indexes:** `ix_rw_org_qo` on `(organization_id, question_code, option_code)` — scoring lookups by answer.

---

## recommendations_log

**Purpose / module:** Audit log of recommendation quiz runs and results. Owning module: `recommendation`.

|Column|Type|Nullable|Default|Meaning|
|------|----|--------|-------|-------|
|id|UUID|no|gen_random_uuid()|Primary key|
|organization_id|UUID|no|—|Owning tenant|
|client_id|UUID|yes|—|Client who took the quiz (optional)|
|answers|TEXT|no|—|Serialized quiz answers|
|primary_service_id|BIGINT|yes|—|Top recommended service|
|alternative_service_ids|VARCHAR(255)|yes|—|Alternate recommendations|
|ai_rationale|TEXT|yes|—|Optional generated rationale text|
|ai_used|BOOLEAN|yes|false|Whether a rationale was generated|
|generated_at|TIMESTAMP|yes|CURRENT_TIMESTAMP|When generated|

* **Primary key:** `id` (UUID).
* **Foreign keys:** none declared at DB level.

---

## audit_logs

**Purpose / module:** Immutable per-action audit trail (non-repudiation). Owning module: `audit`.

|Column|Type|Nullable|Default|Meaning|
|------|----|--------|-------|-------|
|id|BIGSERIAL|no|identity|Primary key|
|organization_id|UUID|yes|—|Owning tenant|
|actor_user_id|UUID|yes|—|Acting user|
|actor_role|VARCHAR(32)|yes|—|Acting user's role|
|action_type|VARCHAR(64)|no|—|Action performed|
|target_entity|VARCHAR(64)|yes|—|Affected entity type|
|target_id|VARCHAR(64)|yes|—|Affected entity id|
|metadata|TEXT|yes|—|JSON/text detail|
|ip_address|VARCHAR(64)|yes|—|Source IP|
|occurred_at|TIMESTAMP|no|CURRENT_TIMESTAMP|When the action occurred|

* **Primary key:** `id` (BIGSERIAL).
* **Foreign keys:** none declared at DB level.
* **Indexes:** `ix_audit_org_at` on `(organization_id, occurred_at)` — time-ordered audit queries.

---

## cutoff_reports

**Purpose / module:** Per-shift cutoff reports. Owning module: `report`.

|Column|Type|Nullable|Default|Meaning|
|------|----|--------|-------|-------|
|id|UUID|no|gen_random_uuid()|Primary key|
|organization_id|UUID|no|—|Owning tenant|
|shift_id|BIGINT|yes|—|Related shift|
|period_start|TIMESTAMP|no|—|Period start|
|period_end|TIMESTAMP|no|—|Period end|
|payload|TEXT|no|—|Serialized report content|
|generated_at|TIMESTAMP|no|CURRENT_TIMESTAMP|When generated|

* **Primary key:** `id` (UUID).
* **Foreign keys:** none declared at DB level (`shift_id` references `shifts` logically).

---

## day_reports

**Purpose / module:** End-of-day reports aggregating cutoff reports. Owning module: `report`.

|Column|Type|Nullable|Default|Meaning|
|------|----|--------|-------|-------|
|id|UUID|no|gen_random_uuid()|Primary key|
|organization_id|UUID|no|—|Owning tenant|
|report_date|DATE|no|—|Report date|
|payload|TEXT|no|—|Serialized report content|
|generated_at|TIMESTAMP|no|CURRENT_TIMESTAMP|When generated|

* **Primary key:** `id` (UUID).
* **Unique constraints:** `uq_day_report` on `(organization_id, report_date)` — one day report per tenant per date.

---

## monthly_reports

**Purpose / module:** Monthly reports aggregating day reports. Owning module: `report`.

|Column|Type|Nullable|Default|Meaning|
|------|----|--------|-------|-------|
|id|UUID|no|gen_random_uuid()|Primary key|
|organization_id|UUID|no|—|Owning tenant|
|report_year|INT|no|—|Report year|
|report_month|INT|no|—|Report month|
|payload|TEXT|no|—|Serialized report content|
|generated_at|TIMESTAMP|no|CURRENT_TIMESTAMP|When generated|

* **Primary key:** `id` (UUID).
* **Unique constraints:** `uq_monthly_report` on `(organization_id, report_year, report_month)` — one report per tenant per month.

---

## Sequences

Created in changeset 0043 (`0043-1-id-sequences`) for human-readable document numbering:

````sql
CREATE SEQUENCE or_number_seq      START WITH 100000 INCREMENT BY 1;
CREATE SEQUENCE receipt_number_seq START WITH 100000 INCREMENT BY 1;
CREATE SEQUENCE tsn_seq            START WITH 1      INCREMENT BY 1;
````

These back `orders.or_number`, `transactions.receipt_number`, and `treatment_slips.tsn`  
respectively.

---

## Dropped tables (historical)

|Table|Created|Dropped|Notes|
|-----|-------|-------|-----|
|`decking_state`|0001|0042|Durable decking snapshot; decking state is now held only in Redis.|
|`cashier_shifts`|0001|0024|Cashier shift reconciliation table; removed from the schema.|

---

## Liquibase changeset conventions

**File naming.** Each changelog lives at  
`apps/sumicare-api/src/main/resources/db/changelog/changes/NNNN-name.xml`, where `NNNN` is a  
zero-padded four-digit ordinal (0001–0060) and `name` is a short kebab-case description  
(e.g. `0049-booking-reference.xml`).

**Changeset id and author.** Within a file, each `<changeSet>` uses an `id` that begins with  
the file ordinal and a descriptive suffix — `id="NNNN-thing"` or `id="NNNN-N-thing"` for  
multiple changesets in one file (e.g. `0012-3-order-items`). The `author` is `sumicare` for  
nearly all changesets (one early changeset uses `opencode`). Liquibase tracks each changeset  
by the triple `(filename, id, author)` in `DATABASECHANGELOG`, so none of these may change  
once applied.

**Ordering.** The master file `db/changelog/db.changelog-master.xml` lists every changelog in  
strict ordinal order via `<include file="changes/NNNN-name.xml" relativeToChangelogFile="true"/>`.  
Liquibase applies changesets in the order they appear in the master include list. New  
changelogs must be appended to the end of the master file.

**Idempotency / preconditions.** Later changesets commonly guard with preconditions such as  
`<preConditions onFail="MARK_RAN"><not><columnExists .../></not></preConditions>` so re-runs  
against partially-migrated databases mark the changeset as run rather than failing. Follow this  
pattern when adding columns/indexes/tables that may already exist in some environments.

**Schema validation at runtime.** Hibernate runs with `spring.jpa.hibernate.ddl-auto: validate`  
(see `apps/sumicare-api/src/main/resources/application.yml`). Hibernate **never creates or  
alters** tables; the schema is entirely migration-managed. On startup Hibernate validates that  
each `@Entity` maps to existing tables/columns and aborts if they are missing — so an entity  
change must always be accompanied by a matching Liquibase changeset.

**How migrations run on startup.** Liquibase is enabled  
(`spring.liquibase.enabled: true`, `change-log: classpath:db/changelog/db.changelog-master.xml`)  
and executes against the configured datasource **before** the JPA `EntityManagerFactory` is  
initialized. Pending changesets are applied in order and recorded in `DATABASECHANGELOG`.

**Failure behavior.** If any changeset fails to apply, Liquibase throws and Spring Boot  
application startup fails — the service does not come up. Because validation runs after  
migration, a successful boot guarantees the live schema matches both the changelogs and the  
entity mappings.

**Adding a new changeset (checklist).**

1. Create `changes/00NN-descriptive-name.xml` with the next ordinal.
1. Add one or more `<changeSet id="00NN-..." author="sumicare">` blocks; keep DDL declarative  
   (`createTable`, `addColumn`, `createIndex`, `addForeignKeyConstraint`, etc.) and add  
   preconditions where re-runnability matters.
1. Append the file to `db.changelog-master.xml` in ordinal order (never reorder existing  
   includes).
1. Update or add the corresponding JPA entity so the mapping matches; otherwise `ddl-auto: validate` will fail on the next boot.
1. Never edit an already-applied changeset — its checksum is recorded; add a new changeset to  
   make further changes.
